jobs.title: Senior Accountant
jobs.content: <p><strong>Senior Accountant</strong></p><p>Instabase is the deep-document-understanding AI platform pioneered around the unstructured-document-to-structured-data data model & the document-AI segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Technical Recruiter
jobs.content: <p>Lead Instabase's recruiting function across the AI Hub / Automation / Build / Apps platform.</p>
